description:

The project has widespread mix format --check-formatted failures on both main and the epic branch feature/file-touch-yields-to-realization. Run mix format from the repo root and commit the result. No logic changes — formatter-only diff.

- mix test passes

Work from a worktree based on main.
title: Fix mix format --check-formatted failures
